cards.name: Holon Energy FF
cards.text: Holon Energy FF provides Colorless Energy. If the Pokémon that Holon Energy FF is attached to also has a basic Fire Energy card attached to it, that Pokémon has no Weakness. If the Pokémon that Holon Energy FF is attached to also has a basic Fighting Energy card attached to it, damage done by that Pokémon's attack isn't affected by Resistance. Ignore these effects if Holon Energy FF is attached to Pokémon-ex.

tests.name: constants
tests.description: Test card constants match the spec
